brandDescription: Mahindra is a leading Indian automotive manufacturer known for rugged SUVs and innovative design. From the XUV 3XO that embodies the XUV DNA to the all-electric XUV400, the powerful XUV700, and the iconic Thar off-roader, Mahindra continues to push boundaries with commanding presence, safety, performance, and luxury.

models.name: XUV 3XO 1.2L Turbo Petrol MT
models.description: With the XUV 3XO, every drive is a statement - with its unmissable design, commanding SUV views, unparalleled safety and expansive comfort, gear up for an authentic SUV experience. Dimensions – 3,990 mm L x 1,821 mm W x 1,647 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,600 mm. Boot Space - 364L. Fuel tank capacity - 42L.

models.name: XUV 3XO EV 39.4 kWh
models.description: The XUV 3XO EV is our new electric SUV offering instant electric power, premium comfort, and advanced safety. Designed to cater to the aspirations and sophisticated needs of modern customers, the XUV 3XO EV perfectly balances urban design, performance, safety and cutting-edge technology. Dimensions – 3,990 mm L x 1,821 mm W x 1,647 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,600 mm. Boot Space - 364L.

models.name: XUV400 EV 34.5 kWh
models.description: The All-Electric XUV400 is an authentic Mahindra SUV, combining toughness with the dynamics and eco-friendliness of an electric powertrain. It offers a compelling proposition of plush interiors, superior performance, ample space, head-turning design, and sci-fi technology. It's Fun. It's Fast. It's Electric.

models.name: XUV700 2.2L Turbo Diesel AT
